item.title: F*ck you GOP Idaho@
item.description: Idaho Republicans "let us tell you all that we hate women without telling you that we hate women" Fuck all these assholes. And their magic sky wizard. This is just more of the evangelical version of Sharia law. https://twitter.com/QasimRashid/status/1507411445981786112

item.title: You know you love Pokémon
item.description: Edit: Story Time! I posted this after I found it today becaused that seemed to be the best way to show my brother (who has long loved Pokémon and appreciates good jokes about it). I'm glad y'all are enjoying it too! Although, really, who wouldn't?

item.title: Day 301: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Dead Guy Burger 1/3lb Certified Angus Beef Patty, Rogue IPA Ground Mustard, Bacon Jam, Fried Onions, Bacon, Blue Cheese, Mayo, Lettuce, Tomato, Rogue Nightmare Black Bun From Rogue Eastside Pub & Pilot Brewery In Portland, Oregon Thank You @RapturetheCity For This Burger Submission! 13/10! Previous Day 300: https://imgur.com/gallery/e1GWbbb MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD
item.dc:creator: crypto

item.dc:creator: EternalLaughter

item.title: Bought this for my 13yo… I hope they like it.
item.description: I struggle with his pronouns since he came out. I’m doing my best and I don’t mean to misgender him. This is an attempt to be supportive. Their mother and I have been divorced for half their life and our relationship has been strained at times. I know it’s just a pin but I’m hoping it shows him that I’ll be here for him and he doesn’t have to be afraid to be himself. Viral edit: you guys have convinced me, I have order a sticker with the same image as the pin and I plan to wear it on my hard hat. As a construction worker I look forward to confronting the ignorant and explaining why wearing it is important.
item.dc:creator: mikeerk365
